dashboard.birthdaysEmpty: No students with a birth date on file this month.
dashboard.birthdaysTodayLead: {count, plural, one {# student has a birthday today} other {# students have birthdays today}} ({date}).

notifications.subtitle: Track your business scheduling updates
notifications.previewSubtitle: Recent updates about bookings and reschedule requests

branding.title: Branding & White-label
branding.noWhiteLabelWarning: White-label features (custom CSS, hide branding) require the Enterprise plan. Basic branding customization is still available.
branding.logoHint: Upload an image file (PNG, JPG or SVG). Max 2MB.
branding.coverHint: Large image shown on your public booking pages.
branding.faviconHint: Icon shown in the browser tab.
branding.customCssHint: Custom CSS will be injected into public pages. Use with care.
branding.hideBrandingLabel: Hide Puncto branding on public pages
branding.linkInBioDescription: This is the public address of your Puncto page.
branding.linkInBioSupportNote: To change the URL, please contact support.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Configure how your business communicates via WhatsApp
whatsapp.modeManualDesc: Free & Starter plans: Select a contact and click a button to open WhatsApp with a preset message. You send it manually.
whatsapp.modeAutomatedDesc: Growth & Pro plans: Messages are sent automatically via WhatsApp Business API. Configured securely on our backend.
whatsapp.presetMessagePlaceholder: Hello! Your appointment is confirmed for {date} at {time}. See you soon!
whatsapp.presetMessageHint: This message is pre-filled when you click "Send WhatsApp" on a contact. Use {date} and {time} as placeholders.
whatsapp.howItWorksManual: In Manual mode, when you click "Send WhatsApp" on a customer or booking, the app opens WhatsApp (mobile or web) with the preset message ready. You review and send it yourself.
whatsapp.step3: Click "Send WhatsApp" next to a contact.
whatsapp.step4: WhatsApp opens with the message pre-filled. Send it manually.
whatsapp.howItWorksAutomated: In Automated mode, the system sends reminders and confirmations directly to your clients' WhatsApp via the Meta WhatsApp Business API. All API configuration is managed securely on our backend—nothing sensitive is exposed to users.
whatsapp.connectDesc: Connect your business WhatsApp number so automated messages are sent from your number to your clients.
whatsapp.connectFacebookReason: WhatsApp is owned by Meta (Facebook). To connect your number securely, Meta requires a one-time login to verify your business. We don't store any Facebook data.
whatsapp.connectNoFacebookSuffix: we can connect your number manually.
whatsapp.connectNotConfigured: Embedded Signup is not configured. Contact support to enable per-business WhatsApp.
whatsapp.bookingConfirmationsDesc: When a booking is created, send confirmation automatically via:

electronicSignature.title: Electronic signature
electronicSignature.subtitle: Legally valid signatures for patients, professionals, and administrative documents.
electronicSignature.unavailable: Electronic signature is not available for this business segment.

health.patientDescription: Collect the patient's electronic signature on a tablet or phone at reception, with audit trail (IP, date, and time).
health.patientBullet1: Consent form for personal and sensitive data processing.
health.patientBullet2: On-screen signature with hash of accepted text.
health.patientBullet3: History linked to the patient record.
health.professionalDescription: When completing a medical record, the professional signs with an ICP-Brasil digital certificate (Lacuna Web PKI integration).
health.professionalNote: Full A1/A3 cloud certificate integration will be enabled here. Today, the EMR flow already prepares the hash and a simulated signature for testing.

admin.documentsDescription: Sign contracts, terms, and internal documents with the company's digital certificate.
admin.documentsBullet1: Linked to contract management and administrative workflows.
admin.documentsBullet2: Audit trail for compliance and archiving.
admin.certificateDescription: Configure the certificate used by your team to sign documents in this panel.
admin.certificateNote: Soon you will be able to connect A1 or cloud A3 certificates here. Contact support if you need early access.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Signatures follow LGPD and MP 2.200-2/2001 (ICP-Brasil) where applicable. Keep certificates valid and restrict access to authorized users.
